title: How powerful was Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: How powerful was Kaworu?             Quote Post by xdiesp » Sun Aug 22, 2010 4:33 pm When I first watched the series, last century, I was under the impression that Kaworu was basically invulnerable and omnipotent. Until he decides to sacrifice himself. But maybe I was wrong, was his AT field eroded by the Rei up there? Or actually crushed by EVA 01? Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Sun Aug 22, 2010 5:01 pm His AT-field is the strongest recorded up to that point by NERV, so he is the strongest of the Adam line short of possibly Adam himself. Though his blow up an entire continent AT-field may have been altered somehow by the human expedition since details of it are still unknown. Anyway, Kaworu is pretty much invincible compared to Unit-01 because he believes Adam is at Terminal Dogma. When he finds out it's actually Lilith, he gives into his feelings for Shinji and pretty much surrenders. I don't think Rei's AT-field actually eroded Kaworu's, but instead the two fields just stays side-by-side since it did not actually do anything except get Kaworu's attention.

[]:             Quote Post by Tycho » Sun Aug 22, 2010 10:15 pm yeah, I think he essentially lowered his AT field willingly (he's the angel of free will after all, or something) to Shinji, both literally (that way EVA01 physically destroyed Kaworu's body) and figuratively (the way he confessed his inner feelings/last wish to Shinji).

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Aug 22, 2010 11:11 pm Did you guys miss the part where a second ATF as strong as his shows up and neutralizes it (obviously Rei's doing)? Without the ATF he's just a squishy little person, no threat at all to an eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Mon Aug 23, 2010 12:40 am NemZ wrote: Did you guys miss the part where a second ATF as strong as his shows up and neutralizes it (obviously Rei's doing)? Without the ATF he's just a squishy little person, no threat at all to an eva.

[]:             Quote Post by xdiesp » Mon Aug 23, 2010 2:37 am Here's the transcript: Misato: Status? Makoto: That's A.T.Field. Shigeru: Another A.T. Field similar to the previous one generated around the terminal dogma. Maya: Invading into the barrier. Misato: Does it mean another angel? Shigeru: No way. No, cannot confirm. AH! I mean, vanished. Misato: Vanished? Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Aug 23, 2010 7:58 am If Kaworu fought a berserk Eva-01, who would've won?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 23, 2010 3:32 pm Yui, of course, because she has mastered the [s:fwpsb30o]Plothax[/s:fwpsb30o] Force.

[]: Kaworu wants you to collect all his Dragon Balls.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Aug 23, 2010 10:00 pm I think he's stronger than Gohan up until the Cell Saga, but after that I think Goku could beat him. Kaworu's definately stronger than Frieza by that point, though. NemZ wrote: Did you guys miss the part where a second ATF as strong as his shows up and neutralizes it (obviously Rei's doing)? Without the ATF he's just a squishy little person, no threat at all to an eva.

[]:             Quote Post by planet news » Mon Aug 23, 2010 10:54 pm Allemann wrote: If Kaworu fought a berserk Eva-01, who would've won?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Aug 24, 2010 12:22 pm planet news wrote: I guess he already kinda lost to Shinji non-berserk.

[]:             Quote Post by xdiesp » Wed Aug 25, 2010 6:21 am I wonder how they would effectively combat Kaworu if he went guerrilla inside the geofront. Sneaking around the structures where the EVA can't fit, or have to destroy walls to get in. Until the place is swiss cheese.

[]: Re: Kaworu wants you to collect all his Dragon Balls.             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Aug 25, 2010 8:19 am Killer Bee wrote: I think he's stronger than Gohan up until the Cell Saga, but after that I think Goku could beat him. Kaworu's definately stronger than Frieza by that point, though.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Aug 25, 2010 9:04 am No need to. Kaworu's power is obviously maximum.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Wed Aug 25, 2010 12:30 pm I can't decide: who is the most powerful character in the show? Kaworu, Berserk Eva-01, or Lilith and Adam if they had their souls back?

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Wed Aug 25, 2010 12:47 pm I get the feeling that post-Zeruel Eva-01 is endowed with powers (both fruits that is) that ensouled Seeds can only half match. Lilith, Adam and Tabris all fall into the latter category (with their souls that is).

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Aug 25, 2010 1:40 pm I'm pretty sure Lilith would count as a single Seed. If she was Giant Naked Rei-level powerful, then that just raises more plot inconsistencies. The strongest entities in the series are probably the ensouled Adam and Lilith, who should stand on equal ground.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Sun Aug 29, 2010 2:16 pm SaltyJoe wrote: No need to. Kaworu's power is obviously maximum.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun Nov 28, 2010 8:28 pm Halicat wrote: I'd pay to see a Kaworu and Rei bitch fight.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Nov 28, 2010 9:57 pm NemZ wrote: Did you guys miss the part where a second ATF as strong as his shows up and neutralizes it (obviously Rei's doing)? Without the ATF he's just a squishy little person, no threat at all to an eva.
